title: Noah Lucas homepage v033 physical AI positioning
changeSummary: Reorients the homepage toward physical AI, mission AI, aerospace/space, robotics, autonomy, edge data, telemetry, and fieldable infrastructure companies.
Uses the Defense AI, Physical AI & Mission-Critical Data Infrastructure resume variant for the identity line, thesis, domains, operating principles, research, investments, metadata, and footer.
Preserves the selected-work evidence, expanded Postmates scope, rounded glass treatment, mobile logo strip, images, and responsive layout.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720; DOM, overflow, and console checks.
checks: Physical-AI identity line, thesis, principles, research, investments, metadata, and footer render as intended.
Selected-work evidence and expanded Postmates scope remain present without horizontal overflow.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
